characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, brown complexion. He has black hair, a beard, and a mustache.
characters.demeanor: Transitions from stressed and anxious to confident, happy, and enthusiastic.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, medium build, brown complexion. She has black hair tied back and wears glasses.
Young adult female, fair complexion, long dark hair.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Sir please cancel मत कीजिए, मेरी first ride है। मेरा 200 रुपये का loss हो जाएगा Sir, please. [Sir please don't cancel, it's my first ride. I will have a 200 rupees loss Sir, please.]
Character A says: Sir don't cancel my ride. I have been waiting since the morning. This is my first ride sir. [Sir don't cancel my ride. I have been waiting since the morning. This is my first ride sir.]
Character B says: Bhaiya I have changed the route. Please check your app. [Brother I have changed the route. Please check your app.]
Character A says: Ma'am English... No. [Ma'am English... No.]
Unknown speaker says: Bhaiya I want to change my drop location. [Brother I want to change my drop location.]
Character A says: Of course ma'am. Please change it in the app I will adjust the route accordingly. [Of course ma'am. Please change it in the app I will adjust the route accordingly.]
Character A says: Customers के साथ English में बात नहीं कर पाता था, इसलिए वो rides cancel कर देते थे। मेरा बहुत loss होता था। [I couldn't speak in English with customers, that's why they used to cancel rides. I faced a lot of loss.]
Character A says: पर Supernova app ने मेरी life बदल दी। रोज़ practice करके मेरी English बहुत improve हो गई है। अब customers respect भी देते हैं और tips भी! [But Supernova app changed my life. By practicing daily, my English has improved a lot. Now customers give respect as well as tips!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: losing business and facing stress due to poor English.
- Shows a clear before/after contrast highlighting the driver's newfound confidence.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution that earns the driver respect and tips.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: देखा आपने? English ना आने से कितनी problems होती हैं। एक दिन मेरी cab में एक manager sir बैठे थे, उन्होंने मुझे Supernova app के बारे में बताया। ये एक AI English teaching app है, जिसमें [Did you see? How many problems happen due to not knowing English. One day a manager sir sat in my cab, he told me about Supernova app. This is an AI English teaching app, in which]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Breaks the fourth wall to connect directly and empathetically with the viewer.
- Introduces the discovery of the Supernova app via a respected passenger.
- Positions the app as an accessible AI-powered English teaching tool.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आप real-life situations में English बोलना सीख सकते हैं। [you can learn to speak English in real-life situations.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Visually demonstrates the app's interface and AI tutor feature.
- Highlights the practical, real-world conversational focus of Supernova without aggressive time-bound claims.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Talk about yourself & hobbies
Speak with AI
SCENE
You are at a party. A guest comes to talk to you. You tell them about yourself.
तुम एक दावत में हो। एक अतिथि आपसे बात करने के लिए आता है। आप उन्हें अपने बारे में बताएं।
आप real-life situations में English बोलना सीख सकते हैं।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: उन्होंने कहा कि daily बस 10-15 minutes practice करो। मैंने भी बिल्कुल वैसा ही किया! Passengers से कैसे बात करनी है, location कैसे पूछनी है, ये सब मैंने AI tutor से सीखा। I am very grateful to Supernova app. इस app ने मेरा confidence बढ़ा दिया है। अब सब मुझे respect देते हैं और tips भी। पिछले 2 महीनों से मेरी एक भी ride cancel नहीं हुई! और हाँ, इसका subscription भी बहुत affordable है। मैं सच कह रहा हूँ, English सीखने के लिए Supernova बहुत best है। [He told me to practice daily for just 10-15 minutes. I did exactly that! How to talk to passengers, how to ask for location, I learned all this from the AI tutor. I am very grateful to Supernova app. This app has boosted my confidence. Now everyone gives me respect and tips too. For the last 2 months, not a single ride of mine has been canceled! And yes, its subscription is also very affordable. I am telling the truth, Supernova is the very best for learning English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the core testimonial and success story in a warm, relatable tone.
- Emphasizes the ease of use (10-15 mins daily) and practical career benefits (no canceled rides).
- Pitches the app as affordable without making specific, hard-sell price claims.

- Prompts immediate download to start practicing with the AI tutor.
